name: Quest Oil Corporation
summary: Quest Oil Corporation acquires, develops, produces, and explores crude oil and natural gas properties in United States and Canada. The company's oil and gas lands consist of land in Warner, South Taber, and Diamond regions of southern Alberta. The company was formerly known as GameState Entertainment, Inc. and changed its name to Quest Oil Corporation in September, 2004. Quest Oil Corporation was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Kerrville, Texas.
